title: quercus × libanerris
intro: Quercus × libanerris, also known as Lebanon oak, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Quercus genus of deciduous trees. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the tannins and flavonoids found in its bark and leaves, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus × libanerris include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Quercus × libanerris include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to support overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
